response: The video game that featured the Houston Rockets player named NBA Sixth Man of the Year in 2012 is **NBA Live 18**. This game, developed by EA Tiburon and published by EA Sports, includes James Harden as its cover athlete, who was named the NBA Sixth Man of the Year in 2012. The game was released in September 2017 and is the 21st installment in the "NBA Live" series.
